# Maggie Lucy

> Maggie Lucy is an Atlanta-based cinematographer with an eye for composition, lighting, and storytelling. She holds a BFA in Film and Animation, with a concentration in Cinematography and a minor in Advertising Photography, from the Rochester Institute of Technology.

## Profile
- Name: Maggie Lucy
- Role: Cinematographer
- Location: Atlanta, GA, USA
- Education: BFA in Film and Animation (Cinematography concentration), Rochester Institute of Technology

## Pages
- [Home](https://maggieclucy.com/): Introduction and navigation
- [Reel](https://maggieclucy.com/reel): Cinematography demo reel
- [Film](https://maggieclucy.com/film): Selected film and cinematography work
- [Photography](https://maggieclucy.com/photo): Photography portfolio
- [Contact](https://maggieclucy.com/contact): Bio, résumé, and contact details

## Contact
- Email: maggieclucy@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maggielucyscamera
